free_text: Production of isotopes He-3,4,6,8 and Li-6,7,8,9,11
in interaction of alpha-particles with nuclei
Sn-112,124 at the energy of 15.3 GeV
silicon: dE detectors of thickness of 71-72 um,
E detectors of thickness 410 and 460 um, and
anticoincidence detectors E of thickness 127-143 um.
